title: SimpleAuth
description: Authentication mod for Fabric or Forge servers
body:
# *Deprecated*. Use [EasyAuth](https://modrinth.com/mod/easyauth) instead. # SimpleAuth Do you have a server that you want to protect from unwanted visitors *without using whitelist*? Or need an extra form of **authentication** for players? This mod will come in handy then - it denies moving, destroying blocks etc. for players that aren't registered / logged in. It's possible to set a global password as well, check wiki for more details. [](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/fabric-api) **Make sure to download the right version, depending on your server being Fabric or Forge one!**
### Features (All options can be found in the [config](https://github.com/samolego/SimpleAuth/wiki/Config) file.)
* Auto login players that have purchased Minecraft * Online UUIDs for online players * Disabled movement for de-authenticated players * Disabled block interactions * Inventory protection (item moving and dropping) * Sessions * Coordinate protection * Prevents "Logged in from another location" * And more (check [wiki](https://github.com/samolego/SimpleAuth/wiki) for details)

### Translations Check [available languages](https://github.com/samolego/SimpleAuth/tree/translations).
*Feel like donating? Visit [donate page](https://samolego.github.io/donate).* ### Other info * Commands can be found on [GitHub wiki](https://github.com/samolego/SimpleAuth/wiki) * Configuration file [info](https://github.com/samolego/SimpleAuth/wiki/Config) * Having issues? Please report them on [GitHub issue tracker](https://github.com/samolego/SimpleAuth/issues) * Living on the edge? Get [latest developer builds](https://samolego.github.io/projects/ci/SimpleAuth/latest)
#### Libraries that the project is using: * [Argon2 (LGPLv3)](https://github.com/phxql/argon2-jvm) * [BCrypt (Apache 2) ](https://github.com/patrickfav/bcrypt) * [Bytes (Apache 2)](https://github.com/patrickfav/bytes-java) * [leveldb (BSD-3-Clause)](https://github.com/google/leveldb) * [JNA (Apache 2 || LGPLv3)](https://github.com/java-native-access/jna)
